title: Summer Line-Up: Your POS Refresher
description: A quick summer tune-up for cashiers heading back to the line - a handful of short stops from ringing the first tray to closing out a clean day, capped with a quick knowledge check.

lessons.title: First Tray of the Day
lessons.intro: Shake off the summer dust and remember how smooth the line can feel when you've got the basics locked in.

lessons.title: Quick Sales at the Line
lessons.intro: When the line is moving fast, this is the shortcut that keeps things flowing.

lessons.title: Oops, No Worries: Fixing a Transaction
lessons.intro: Everyone makes a small slip now and then - here is how to tidy it up without any drama.

lessons.title: See You Tomorrow: Closing Out the Day
lessons.intro: The bell rings, the line clears, and now it is time to wrap up cleanly.

lessons.title: Clean Hands, Happy Trays (ICN/USDA Video)
lessons.intro: A friendly reminder from the Institute of Child Nutrition and USDA - good hand hygiene is the first ingredient in every safe meal.

lessons.title: Food Safety Quick Check
lessons.intro: A quick check on the food-safety refresher you just watched - handwashing, safe temperatures, and the danger zone.
